introduction: The "All tracks" playlist (capitalized as "All Tracks" in the [[Regional differences|Europe and Australia/New Zealand regions]]) contains all 118 {{S3}} tracks available on Nintendo Music, covering up to [[Fresh Season 2023]] and lasting 4 hours and 27 minutes.
